scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace apps/api && npm run lint --workspace apps/web
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --workspace apps/api && npm run lint --workspace apps/web -- --fix
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace apps/api && npm run test --workspace apps/web
